_comment: Move database. type: Physical/Special/Status. element: pokemon type. power: base damage (0 for status). accuracy: 0-100. pp: power points per battle.

moves.name: Tackle
moves.description: A physical attack in which the user charges and slams into the target.

moves.name: Scratch
moves.description: Hard, pointed, sharp claws rake the target to inflict damage.

moves.name: Quick Attack
moves.description: The user lunges at the target at a speed that makes it almost invisible.

moves.name: Body Slam
moves.description: The user drops onto the target with its full body weight.

moves.name: Hyper Beam
moves.description: The target is attacked with a powerful beam. The user can't move on the next turn.

moves.name: Slam
moves.description: The target is slammed with a long tail, vines, or the like.

moves.name: Ember
moves.description: The target is attacked with small flames.

moves.name: Flame Burst
moves.description: The user attacks the target with a bursting flame.

moves.name: Flamethrower
moves.description: The target is scorched with an intense blast of fire.

moves.name: Fire Blast
moves.description: The target is attacked with an intense blast of all-consuming fire.

moves.name: Water Gun
moves.description: The target is blasted with a forceful shot of water.

moves.name: Bubble Beam
moves.description: A spray of bubbles is forcefully ejected at the target.

moves.name: Surf
moves.description: The user attacks everything around it by swamping its surroundings with a giant wave.

moves.name: Hydro Pump
moves.description: The target is blasted by a huge volume of water launched under great pressure.

moves.name: Vine Whip
moves.description: The target is struck with slender, whiplike vines.

moves.name: Razor Leaf
moves.description: Sharp-edged leaves are launched to slash at opposing Pokemon.

moves.name: Solar Beam
moves.description: The user gathers light, then blasts a bundled beam on the next turn.

moves.name: Seed Bomb
moves.description: The user barrages the target with hard-shelled seeds from above.

moves.name: Thunder Shock
moves.description: A jolt of electricity crashes down on the target.

moves.name: Thunderbolt
moves.description: A strong electric blast crashes down on the target.

moves.name: Thunder
moves.description: A wicked thunderbolt is dropped on the target to inflict damage.

moves.name: Ice Beam
moves.description: The target is struck with an icy-cold beam of energy.

moves.name: Blizzard
moves.description: A howling blizzard is summoned to strike opposing Pokemon.

moves.name: Ice Shard
moves.description: The user flash-freezes chunks of ice and hurls them at the target.

moves.name: Karate Chop
moves.description: The target is attacked with a sharp chop.

moves.name: Cross Chop
moves.description: The user delivers a double chop with its forearms crossed.

moves.name: Brick Break
moves.description: The user attacks with a swift chop. It can also break barriers.

moves.name: Poison Sting
moves.description: The user stabs the target with a poisonous stinger.

moves.name: Sludge Bomb
moves.description: Unsanitary sludge is hurled at the target.

moves.name: Shadow Ball
moves.description: The user hurls a shadowy blob at the target.

moves.name: Shadow Claw
moves.description: The user slashes with a sharp claw made from shadows.

moves.name: Psychic
moves.description: The target is hit by a strong telekinetic force.

moves.name: Confusion
moves.description: The target is hit by a weak telekinetic force.

moves.name: Bug Bite
moves.description: The user bites the target.

moves.name: X-Scissor
moves.description: The user slashes at the target by crossing its scythes or claws.

moves.name: Wing Attack
moves.description: The target is struck with large, imposing wings spread wide.

moves.name: Aerial Ace
moves.description: The user confounds the target with speed, then slashes.

moves.name: Hurricane
moves.description: The user attacks by wrapping its opponent in a fierce wind.

moves.name: Dragon Claw
moves.description: The user slashes the target with huge sharp claws.

moves.name: Dragon Pulse
moves.description: The target is attacked with a shock wave generated by the user's gaping mouth.

moves.name: Outrage
moves.description: The user rampages and attacks for two to three turns.

moves.name: Bite
moves.description: The target is bitten with viciously sharp fangs.

moves.name: Dark Pulse
moves.description: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with dark thoughts.
